extortion.description: Blystone & Bailey, CPAs, PC is a Michigan-based CPA firm offering a range of services including audit, tax preparation and planning, payroll, financial planning, bookkeeping, and IT services management.  The firm caters to various industries such as real estate, hospitality, oil, gas and energy, professional services, construction, manufacturing, retail, agriculture, franchising, and government and non-profit sectors.  We have the entire Blystone & Bailey customer base at our disposal. Mail, financial documents, audits and more.
